---
title: "IFCD0210 Sprint Backlog"
categories: [ifcd0210, backlog]
toc: true
number-sections: false
format:
  html
filters:
   - lightbox
lightbox: true
---

<style>

.heatMap th { background:  #f4f4f4;}
tr:nth-child(3) {background-color: #f4f4f4;}
tr:nth-child(6) {background-color: #f4f4f4;}
th, td {
  padding: 8px;
  text-align: left;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ddd;
}

tr:hover {background-color:  #f4f4f4;}

</style>

![Sprint Backlog](/images/home/backlog.jpg){width="30%"}

<div class="heatMap">

::: {.column-page-right}

##  ``Sprint#19: graphQL & noSQL, openCode AI (II)`` (April 2026)

| # | Day | Date | Topics |  Details Topics |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
|  **#19** | 63 | 20/04/2026 |    - Spring Boot AWS `personNoSQL` Sandbox: </br> (1) noSql: pK and sK </br> (2) `Teacher` / `Student` /`Person` document/`item` (gsheet) </br>  (3) `noSqlPerson` how to relate items? Pk? Social Club? Programming courses? Catalonia elementary schools?</br> (4) Defining unique-table </br>  (5) Spring Boot `graphQL` </br> (6) Test with GraphiQL `Playground` / Postman  </br> (7) create a subscription: `createPerson`  </br> </br> <s> - Reactive Programming: `Webflux`: `Flux`, `Sink`, `Publisher`, ... </br> - Pub-Sub pattern </s>  </br></br> - React `personNoSQL-react` Sandbox: </br> (1) VITE project </br> (2) **Apollo client**: queries, mutations, subscriptons </br> (3) **render view**: form for person and list of all persons  </br> </br> -**WebMCP**: intro, from Context to API </br> - **flight-demo-webMCP** with agent AI   | - [noSqlPerson: 482257](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/tree/482257e498a7e9a06c68061e70912aee314b94d7){.external target='_blank'}  </br>    - [SpreadSheet NoSql person](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1UYVKKlaXtwYl7nI-MfBhrRZpycEDlwbtR0srz7UiSLg/edit?usp=sharing){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Adding GraphQL Subscriptions](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/blob/master/doc/SUBSCRIPTION_GUIDE.md){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [personNoSql + graphQL](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/blob/master/doc/personNoSql_graphQL.md){.external target='_blank'} </br></br> - [Choosing the Right DynamoDB Partition Key](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/database/choosing-the-right-dynamodb-partition-key/){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [What is a NoSQL database?](https://www.ibm.com/think/topics/nosql-databases){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Key Concepts](https://www.dynamodbguide.com/key-concepts/){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [Spring for GraphQL](https://spring.io/projects/spring-graphql){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [Getting started with Spring for GraphQL](https://www.graphql-java.com/tutorials/getting-started-with-spring-boot){.external target='_blank'}   </br> - [How schema works](https://graphql.org/learn/schema/){.external target='_blank'} </br> ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/refs/heads/master/doc/screenshots/react-apollo/react-apollo-7.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}  </br> - <s>[Web on Reactive Stack](https://docs.spring.io/spring-framework/reference/web-reactive.html){.external target='_blank'} </s></br> </BR> - [Travel WebMCP Demo](https://github.com/GoogleChromeLabs/webmcp-tools/tree/main/demos/react-flightsearch){.external target='_blank'} </BR> - [WebMCP Tutorial](https://www.datacamp.com/tutorial/webmcp-tutorial){.external target='_blank'}|
|   | 64 | 21/04/2026 |  - Spring Boot AWS `personNoSQL` Sandbox: </BR> (1) **new data model**  </BR></BR> - Reactive Programming: `Webflux`: `Flux`, `Sink`, `Publisher`, ... </br> - `Pub-Sub` pattern   </br></br>   - React `personNoSQL-react` Sandbox: </br> (1) VITE project </br> (2) `Apollo client`: queries, mutations, subscriptons </br> (3) render view: form for person and list of all persons  </br> (4) render view: **subscripton** </br> | - [noSqlPerson: 8c2a3d](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/tree/18c2a3dd54b9a2a572e6a97db20ca34f67f18a75){.external target='_blank'}  </br>  - [Apollo Client Configuration Changes](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/noSqlPerson/blob/master/doc/ApolloClient_AddingWS.md){.external target='_blank'}  </br></br> - [websocketking](https://websocketking.com/){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [Apollo Link overview](https://www.apollographql.com/docs/react/api/link/introduction){.external target='_blank'} </br></br> ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/graphql-subs.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br> ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/graphql-subs-2.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}  </br>  ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/graphql-subs-3.jpg){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}</br> by Eric</br> ![by Eric](/images/ifcd0210-26/graphql-subs-3.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}  </br>  |
|   |    | | |
|   |   65 | 23/04/2026   | - OpenCodeAi: </br> (1) how Agents AI work </br> (2) orchestration </br> (3) Memory: short and long memory  </br> (4) **MCP: SqLittle as a long-memory store**  </br> </br>  - Spring Boot AI Orchestrator: </br> (1) @Tool, @Agent, @Task, etc </br> (2) MCP with SqLittle</br> (3) **Enhanced Spring Boot MCP for Natural Queries** </br> </br> - ANN: Intro  | - [openCodeAi: 46ec61d3](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/openCodeAI/tree/46ec61d3f18122d12c2c1e14a3438232dd2553e1){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [openCode_MCP_Memory](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/openCodeAI/blob/46ec61d3f18122d12c2c1e14a3438232dd2553e1/docs/openCode_MCP_Memory.md){.external target='_blank'}  </br></br> ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AlbertProfe/openCodeAI/46ec61d3f18122d12c2c1e14a3438232dd2553e1/docs/diagrams/HowBuildAgentAI.JPG){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br> </br>  - [What is the Model Context Protocol (MCP)?](https://modelcontextprotocol.io/docs/getting-started/intro){.external target='_blank'} </br> - [MCP: repo](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [MCP servers example: repo](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers){.external target='_blank'}   </br> </br>  - [Large Language Models explained briefly](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LPZh9BOjkQs){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [But what is a neural network?](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aircAruvnKk){.external target='_blank'}|
|   |  66  | 24/04/2026 | - <s>`ApartmentPrediction-React_masterDoc`: **v6.2**, school `CREATE` </br> (0) form  for create new `School`  </br> (1) logic for `School`, new school and assign apartment  </br>  (3) map with schools</s> </br></br> ++ AI Waves: ML, DL, ANN, Gen AI, Agents, Agentic AI  </br></br> ++ **AI Memory**: long term (project structure, model, revisions, versions, etc) </br> - MCP + SqlLittle </br></br> ++ **What is an AI Agent**: code that think, decide and execute on a autonomous way </br> - **Agent AI building blocks**: goal, role, orchestrate, LLM, tools, memory, test, output  |  - <s>[api tools](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/blob/9c4d459744d95a310874f4d64cc7900b07fc7583/ApartmentPredictor-React/.opencode/tools/api.ts){.external target='_blank'} </br>  - [Rules](https://opencode.ai/docs/rules/){.external target='_blank'} / - [Skills](https://opencode.ai/docs/skills/){.external target='_blank'} / - [Tools](https://opencode.ai/docs/tools/){.external target='_blank'} </br>- [dataModel-refactor: repo at refactor-middleware-data-2](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/ApartmentPredictor-React/tree/refactor-middleware-data-2/ApartmentPredictor-React/dataModel-refactor){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [Spring Boot AI vs OpenCode](/images/ifcd0210-26/docs/OpenCode_vs_SpringBoot%20AIAgents_%20Orchestration.md){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [OpenCode Multi-Agent](/images/ifcd0210-26/docs/OpenCodeMulti-Agent.md){.external target='_blank'}  </br> - [OpenCode:folders](/images/ifcd0210-26/docs/openCode-folders.md){.external target='_blank'} </s> </br> </br> ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/agentic_framework.jpeg){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}  </br> ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/ai_memory.jpeg){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br> - [openCode_MCP_Memory](https://github.com/AlbertProfe/openCodeAI/blob/46ec61d3f18122d12c2c1e14a3438232dd2553e1/docs/openCode_MCP_Memory.md){.external target='_blank'}  </br> ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/ai-memo-1.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"} </br> ![](/images/ifcd0210-26/ai-memo-2.png){.lightbox width=80% fig-align="center"}|
: Backlog Sprint#19 April 2026 {tbl-colwidths="[2,2,2,55,39]"}
:::

</div>

::: {.callout-note}
- `---------` <s>topic pending</s>
- `-` topic done in class
- `++` new topic not planned
:::
